entries.definition_text: part (in calculation of proportion) (passim). 2. square (of a diagram) (passim). 3. part (one of the āyādi series) 32.24; 33.59; 36.296.

two 13.12. 2. axle (ref. vehicle) 31.34, 36-38, 48, 55. 3. urethra (ref. liṅga) 35.27. 4. myrobolan (beleric; wood not to be used in buildings for mortals, sap used for preparing coating, Terminalla belerica, Roxb.) 15.111; 18.93, 99, 117.
